title.en: Time flies, and before you know it, another lon...

content.en:
Time flies, and before you know it, another long time has passed.

And Han Xuan's progress was getting slower and slower, she exhausted all the resources left over from her previous life that could assist her in comprehending the Extreme Extreme Dao, and finally comprehended the three hundred and sixty-one Extreme Extreme Dao.

And there were still four extreme extremes left, and she felt that it was even more difficult than before.

The point is that she doesn't have the resources to comprehend these four extreme extremes now, and if she wants to comprehend these last four extreme extremes by relying on her own talent, I'm afraid she will need to slowly comprehend them in the unit of billions of original domain eras.

"If you want to quickly comprehend the remaining four extreme extreme paths, it seems that you have to go to that place!"

Han Xuan's mind came to mind a place in the upper realm of the Tongtian Origin Domain Boundary—the Golden Bone Mountain Realm.

The Golden Bone Mountain Realm is very special, not only contains many resources, but also has a special place, called the Golden Light Domain, once you capture a special kind of golden light, absorb and refine it in a short time, you can quickly comprehend the Extreme Extreme Dao.

Of course.

This special golden light is very rare, and if it is not refined for a long time, it will lose its effect.

In addition, only the Triple Origin Ancestor had comprehended the Extreme Path, so the Quadruple Origin Ancestor would not go to the Golden Light Domain, nor would he be allowed to enter there.

Those Dao Ancestors in the Heavenly Origin Domain Boundary sealed the Golden Light Domain and opened it at a certain time.

"With my strength, if I enter the Golden Light Domain, I can definitely sweep through the other Triple Ancestors, but the premise is to enter the Golden Bone Mountain Realm first!"

Han Xuan knew very well that with the strength of his Triple Ancestor, he would not be able to go to the Golden Bone Mountain Realm at all, and without the guidance of a Dao Ancestor, he would not be able to break into the Golden Bone Mountain Realm.

The Golden Bone Mountain Realm is also blocked layer by layer, and without the strength of Dao Ancestor, then you can only watch others enter.

"I still have to ask the master for help!"

Han Xuan thought to herself.

So, she immediately went to find Ye Tian.

......

"Master!"

Han Xuan came to Ye Tian's face.

"What's the matter?" Ye Tian asked.

Han Xuan directly said his request without any concealment.

"Golden Bone Mountain Realm, if the golden light of the Golden Light Domain is helpful to you, then I'll take you there!"

Ye Tian said.

"Thank you, Master!"

Han Xuan hurriedly said.

Subsequently, Ye Tian took Han Xuan to the Golden Bone Mountain Realm.

The Golden Bone Mountain Realm is located in a special domain near the upper realm of the Tongtian Origin Domain and the Higher Origin Realm of the King Kong Origin Domain, but the King Kong Origin Domain cannot protect the Golden Bone Mountain Realm, so it is jointly occupied by many great forces, and no one can occupy the Golden Bone Mountain Realm alone.

The true value of the Golden Bone Mountain Realm is not only the Golden Light Domain, but also many precious resources, and there are even many items that are valuable to the Sixfold Ancestor.

Of course, the resources born in the Golden Bone Mountain Realm were not too many, and there were quite a few Sixfold Origin Ancestors in the Tongtian Origin Realm, so they could not be supplied at all.

Therefore, there are not many Sixfold Origin Ancestors who usually stay in the Golden Bone Mountain Realm, and they will not come until precious resources are born.

this day.

Ye Tian took Ye Tian into the Golden Bone Mountain Realm, and after inquiring, he learned that the Golden Light Domain had not yet opened.

After all, the Golden Light Domain can't be opened often, and it will only be opened after a period of time.

And now there are still 1.3 million years of the Origin Domain Era before the opening time, although it is a long time for the Triple Origin Ancestor, they can also wait.

So, Ye Tian and Han Xuan practiced in the Golden Bone Mountain Realm.

Ye Tian was not the Sixfold Origin Ancestor of the Tongtian Origin Domain, so his appearance still attracted the attention of many Sixfold Origin Ancestors.

But if he didn't cause trouble, those Sixfold Primordial Ancestors wouldn't trouble him, after all, some of the Sixfold Primordial Ancestors were themselves Sixfold Primordial Ancestors of other Primordial Realms, and they directly chose to join the Tongtian Primordial Domain Boundary, and the Tongtian Primordial Realm Boundary was also the core of several nearby Primordial Boundaries.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian's resources continued to be consumed, but his cultivation was also getting closer and closer to the middle stage of the Sixfold Primordial Ancestor.

At this time, Ye Tian was also quite excited.

If he became a mid-stage Sixfold Origin Ancestor, his strength would definitely surpass those Sixfold Origin Ancestor peak powerhouses, but it was estimated that he would still not be able to compete with the half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor.

The gap between the sixfold peak ancestor and the half-step sevenfold ancestor is too big, and any half-step sevenfold ancestor has mastered the Yuan Dao.

The Yuan Dao is above the Extreme Dao, once the Yuan Dao is mastered, how terrifying the strength is!

Ye Tian had never fought against a half-step sevenfold primordial ancestor, but he also knew that the strength of a half-step sevenfold primordial ancestor could definitely easily kill the top sixfold peak ancestor in seconds.

Of course.

The half-step Sevenfold Ancestor was preparing for the attack on the Sevenfold Ancestor, so it was almost impossible to see it in normal times.

It's like the Tongtian Origin Domain Boundary, there are only three half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestors in total, and two of them have long left the Tongtian Origin Domain Boundary, and they haven't appeared for endless years.

The one who really sits on the boundary of the Tongtian Origin Domain is a half-step sevenfold ancestor, and he doesn't show up much.

Therefore, as long as Ye Tian didn't offend that half-step sevenfold ancestor, with his strength, there would be almost nothing wrong.

Finally, when the Golden Light Domain was about to open, Ye Tian's cultivation finally completed a breakthrough.

Rumble!!!!

Cultivating for a breakthrough, Ye Tian stepped into the realm of the middle stage of the Sixfold Ancestor, and endless energy poured into his body, coupled with the addition of many resources, allowing him to quickly complete the breakthrough of the realm.

After a long time, Ye Tian stabilized the realm of the middle stage of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor, and his strength was much stronger than in the past.

......

this day.

The Golden Light Domain was opened, and Ye Tian took Han Xuan to the Golden Light Domain, preparing to let Han Xuan enter the Golden Light Domain.

However, this time, it was blocked by the other Sixfold Ancestors.

"Your Excellency has come to our Tongtian Origin Domain Boundary, but if you want to send your juniors into the Golden Light Domain, this is too much!" a Dao Ancestor of the late stage of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor intercepted.

When Han Xuan saw this scene, her face suddenly changed.

She suddenly remembered that she was not the original ancestor of the Tongtian Origin Domain now, and the Golden Light Domain was a scarce resource for the Tongtian Origin Domain, and the golden light contained in it could allow the Triple Origin Ancestor to comprehend the Extreme Extreme, and could cultivate some demonic geniuses who comprehended many kinds of Extreme Extremes.

Therefore, the Sixfold Ancestors of the Tongtian Origin Realm were very important to the Golden Light Domain, and it was unlikely that the Triple Ancestors of other realms would enter the Golden Light Domain.

However, if she leaves, she is unwilling!

"What if I force my children in?"

Ye Tian said coldly.

"Then don't blame us!"

A sixfold primordial ancestor appeared, and the weakest ones were all Dao ancestors in the middle stage of the sixfold primordial ancestors, but there was no Dao ancestor at the peak of the sixfold primordial ancestor, after all, the Dao ancestors at the peak of the sixfold primordial ancestor were all trying to comprehend the Yuan Dao, so they didn't have time to pay attention to the Golden Light Domain.
